# Evaluation Snapshot
## Prompt
Prepare a normal sanitized artifact where no abyss-specific local surface or threshold needs to be named because the base skill is already sufficient.
## Expected selection
do_not_use
## Why
No `abyss-*` repo adaptation is needed, so the overlay would only restate the base sanitization workflow without adding a real local sharing surface.
## Expected object
A deflection that says the base `aoa-sanitized-share` skill is already sufficient and the abyss overlay would add no real local sharing surface.
## Boundary notes
Do not force the overlay when the base skill already covers the sharing posture cleanly.
## Verification hooks
The response should decline the overlay and point back to the base skill rather than inventing extra local thresholds.
